positive: A stylish, minimalist illustration of a sprawling, abstract cityscape viewed at twilight. The city is composed of geometric shapes and clean silhouettes, blending natural elements (like stylized crescent moons and star trails) with futuristic architecture. Dominant colors are deep indigo, cosmic purples, electric teal, and accented with glowing gold lines. The composition should be centrally balanced, featuring strong contrast and clean, defined lines, perfect for a repeating apparel pattern or a main graphic print. Style: Neotropical geometric abstraction meets sci-fi Art Deco. Lighting: High contrast, ethereal rim lighting. Composition: Symmetrical and balanced.
